claim_boundary: places persistent observer-facing record objects into the observer-derived modular-response H3 chart using only sampled observers that see the object. The preview receipt requires either a localized H3 object subpopulation beating shuffled incidence or a whole-population compactness distribution that robustly beats shuffled incidence, plus the strict modular-response H3 chart gate. The bulk-population receipt additionally requires the non-boundary leakage audit to pass. If boundary_leakage_audit_pass is false, this is an H3 preview, not a bulk-population proof. This is not a neutral third-person reconstruction, CMB, or particle claim.
